college_info.college_name: PGP College of Arts and Science - PGPCAS: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The TANCET registration window is expected to open in Mar 2026 for PGP College of Arts and Science - PGPCAS admission to the MBA course.

placements.overview: Established in 1994, PGP College of Arts and Science - PGPCAS is located in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA. These courses are offered in Full Time and Part Time mode. A total of 42 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Hospitality & Travel. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, best college for MBA course.

review_content.Placements: About 72% of our course students get placed. The average salary is 15 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ICICI Bank, AT Kearney, Accenture, etc. The maximum salary offered is 26 LPA. About 70% of students get internships. Top level roles offered are management consultant, project manager, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus was large, comfortable, and clean. Each branch had its own office in a separate building. Classrooms were very good. College had a special library funded by the world-bank and had every kind of technical book. College offered two beautiful hostels for 1st-year students and a large outdoor stadium.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: About 85% to 90% of students are placed in our courses. Top recruiting firms like Wipro, HDFC Bank, Google, etc., visit our campus. Almost all students get internships. Recommended top roles are Business Analyst, Manager, and Credit Analyst. The maximum salary package offered is 22 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 17 LPA to 18 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities and infrastructure are good. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are available, and other electronic devices are provided. It also has a library with several books. The classrooms are excellent and provide practical knowledge of 3D animation. Hostel facilities are good and include a mess with hygiene. The college provides medical facilities to the students, and sports and entertainment options are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of PGP College of Arts and Science - PGPCAS.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students in our course got placed. Research and development are the top roles offered in our course. The salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. Omega Healthcare and Biocon are among the top recruiting companies. The highest salary offered is more than Rs. 50,000 per month.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are knowledgeable and helpful. The teaching quality is excellent. The course curriculum is excellent, useful, and interesting. They teach in a way that makes students ready for industry work and research.
review_content.Other: There are lots of extracurricular activities. Some of them are sports, functional activities, cultural activities, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has excellent teaching quality, and placements were good in 2018.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students in our course got placed. The salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. Omega Healthcare and Biocon are top recruiting companies in our course. Research and development are top roles offered in our course. The highest package offered is above Rs. 50,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, labs, and the library is well-equipped and excellent looking. The college infrastructure is attractable, and well-designed classrooms and very well-equipped instruments were available in labs. A lot, of course, relevant books were available in the library. The hostel was well cleanable and in hygienic conditions.

review_content.Other: College has a central library, hostel and canteen. It is well equipped with all facilities. It has an awesome campus located on a hilly terrain with lush green surrounding. You can find people from all across the country and even from abroad. There is open hall for college fest(Karandak).

review_summary.college_name: Jan Nayak Chaudhary Devi Lal Institute of Business Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good for those who handle their family business, teachers were good.

content.Placements: Actually in this college, students don't look after placements. Most of them manage their family business along with the college. Number of students recruited were very few as the students don't show interest in placements, so the TPO office is also interested in MBA batch rather than BBA batch.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had Wi-Fi, computer lab, library and AC classrooms (AC's weren't working properly by the way). I was a day scholar, so I am not aware about the hostel. The canteen was good. Medical facilities were also good, there is a multi speciality hospital inside our college campus. Cricket tournaments were played in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: If you want to do UG course then go for this college and for PG you can go anywhere else .

content.Placements: Placements are not so great because companies hardly gives preference to this college and there are hardly 10% students who get placement from college and there are no internship offered by college the highest package offered is 6 Lacs pa and lowest is 3 Lacs pa.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good and clean with hostel facilities for both girls snd boys. There are separate ground for sports and there are separate auditorium for each course. Mess food is quite decent and there is total 5 canteens in college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: JCD Institute of Business Management college.

content.Placements: I am still pursuing my graduation so I don't know much about placement. So I can't say anything about the placement and their packages.
content.Infrastructure: At JCD Institute of business management, The classrooms are huge. A cold water facility is also available. Toilets for girls and boys are separate and are neat and clean. There is one computer lab and one library. One has access to 4 books at a time.
content.Faculty: The faculty member of Institute of business management are so good and helpful. They themselves provide notes for exams. They also help us to make notes in classroom. And the teaching skills of every teacher is so perfect. All faculty member are so friendly in nature.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: For placements, the campus is not relevant but to enjoy college life is the best.

content.Placements: Placement of students in companies or other institutions is very low because there is hardly any company which visit our campus for placement. But staff members always eager students to prepare for competitive exams and help students by taking their doubts. College also provide us environment and practical approaches which require for establishing business and marketing activities.
content.Infrastructure: There is no doubt that infrastructure is good because the college has a huge campus with proper sewage and cleaning facility. Tree plantation and gardening are also up to the mark. But drinking water facility is not as per standard and there is no digital board and electronically teaching facility.

The quality of food in the canteen is not good as most of the colleges. The hostel rooms are just average. I was a day scholar, and I did not face any issues during my tenure.
